scripts.deploy:ha: npm run build && tar -C dist -cf - . | ssh ha.lan 'docker exec homeassistant sh -c "rm -rf /config/www/solaroid && mkdir -p /config/www/solaroid" && docker exec -i homeassistant tar -C /config/www/solaroid -xf -'
